scripts.vercel-build: php -r "copy('https://getcomposer.org/installer', 'composer-setup.php');" && php composer-setup.php --install-dir=. --filename=composer.phar && php composer.phar install --no-dev --prefer-dist --optimize-autoloader --no-interaction && rm -f composer-setup.php composer.phar && npm install && npm run build && mkdir -p public/storage/img && cp -R public/img/* public/storage/img/
